=====On hand===== {{anchor|Duraludon 3}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Raihan |width=74 |pkmn=Duraludon |giga=yes |type1=Steel |type2=Dragon |img=Raihan Duraludon Adventures.png |cap=Raihan's Duraludon |img2=Raihan Gigantamax Duraludon Adventures.png |cap2=Raihan's Gigantamax Duraludon |img_size=100px |img2_size=100px |epnum=PASS11 |epname=Gulp!! Gulp Pokémon |desc={{p|Duraludon}} is Raihan's first known Pokémon. It was first seen with its Trainer as he wondered about the Trainers participating in the Gym Challenge. Later, he used it to battle [[Dynamax]] Pokémon that were rampaging due to the [[Darkest Day]]. None of Duraludon's moves are known.{{tt|*|Duraludon is implied to know a Dragon-type attack due to the use of G-Max Depletion}}
As a Gigantamax Duraludon, it can use {{m|G-Max Depletion}}.{{tt|*|mentioned only}}}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Raihan |pkmn=Sandaconda |type1=Ground |img=Raihan Sandaconda Adventures.png |img_size=170px |epnum=PASS12 |epname=Thump!! The Gazing Sage |desc={{p|Sandaconda}} is Raihan's second known Pokémon. It was first used in Raihan's battle against [[Henry Sword|Henry]], where it emerged victorious. Sandaconda's known moves are {{m|Sandstorm}}, {{m|Skull Bash}}, and {{m|Slam}}.}} {{anchor|Goodra 3}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Raihan |pkmn=Goodra |type1=Dragon |img=Raihan Goodra Adventures.png |img_size=170px |epnum=PASS17 |epname=Stealth!! Infiltrate the Energy Plant |desc={{p|Goodra}} is Raihan's third known Pokémon. It was first used to help Raihan sneak into the [[Energy Plant]]. None of Goodra's moves are known.}} {{anchor|Flygon 3}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Raihan |pkmn=Flygon |type1=Ground |type2=Dragon |img=Raihan Flygon Adventures.png |img_size=170px |epnum=PASS17 |epname=Stealth!! Infiltrate the Energy Plant |desc={{p|Flygon}} is Raihan's fourth known Pokémon. It was first used to help Raihan sneak into the [[Energy Plant]]. It was later used to battle {{p|Eternatus}} on the Tower Summit. Flygon's only known move is {{m|Dragon Rush}}.}}
